title: Add bilingual French support with language switcher

requirements.summary: Create language switcher UI component in header displaying 'EN | FR' text
acceptanceCriteria: Language switcher displays 'EN | FR' text in the header
Switcher is positioned near navigation menu and easily visible
Clicking 'EN' switches to English language
Clicking 'FR' switches to French language
Header structure, logo, and navigation links remain unchanged

file_operations.description: Add language switcher UI component displaying 'EN | FR' text positioned near the navigation menu, integrating with language context to toggle between English and French, without changing the header structure, logo, or navigation links

requirements.summary: Implement language state management using React context to track selected language
acceptanceCriteria: Language state is managed via React context or state hooks
Current language (English or French) is accessible to all components
Default language is English on initial page load
Language selection persists across page navigation

file_operations.description: Create React context providing language state ('en' or 'fr'), toggle function, and translation lookup function, with default language set to English and all translations for the entire application stored in a structured object
Wrap the layout content with LanguageProvider to make language state accessible to all components throughout the application

requirements.summary: Translate all Home page text content to simple French while keeping 'MORSHID' unchanged
acceptanceCriteria: All Home page text is translated to simple, farmer-friendly French
The name 'MORSHID' remains unchanged in both languages
French translations are natural and easy for farmers to understand
All hero text, card content, testimonials, stats, and buttons are translated

file_operations.description: Replace all hardcoded text strings with translation function calls using the language context, covering hero headline, subtitle, availability text, Four Pillars card titles and descriptions, How It Works step descriptions, testimonials, stats text, YouTube section, and CTA button labels, while keeping 'MORSHID' unchanged

requirements.summary: Translate all For Farmers page text content to simple French while keeping 'MORSHID' unchanged
acceptanceCriteria: All For Farmers page text is translated to simple, farmer-friendly French
The name 'MORSHID' remains unchanged in both languages
Service cards, FAQ content, and CTA text are translated
French translations are natural and relatable to farmers

file_operations.description: Replace all hardcoded text strings with translation function calls using the language context, covering hero title, subtitle, all four service card titles and descriptions, FAQ questions and answers, and CTA section text, while keeping 'MORSHID' unchanged

requirements.summary: Translate all Contact page text content to simple French while keeping 'MORSHID' unchanged
acceptanceCriteria: All Contact page text is translated to simple, farmer-friendly French
The name 'MORSHID' remains unchanged in both languages
Page title, subtitle, contact cards, and response-time note are translated
French translations are clear and easy for farmers to understand

file_operations.description: Replace all hardcoded text strings with translation function calls using the language context, covering page title, subtitle, all three contact card titles and descriptions (WhatsApp, Email, Phone), and response-time note, while keeping 'MORSHID' unchanged

requirements.summary: Translate header navigation link labels to French while keeping 'MORSHID' logo unchanged
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation links display in French when French is selected
Home becomes 'Accueil', For Farmers becomes 'Pour les Agriculteurs', Contact remains 'Contact'
The MORSHID logo text remains unchanged in both languages
Language switcher displays correctly in both languages

file_operations.description: Replace hardcoded navigation link labels with translation function calls ('Home' → 'Accueil', 'For Farmers' → 'Pour les Agriculteurs', 'Contact' → 'Contact'), while keeping the MORSHID logo text unchanged in both languages

requirements.summary: Translate footer component text to French while keeping technical details and 'MORSHID' unchanged
acceptanceCriteria: Footer text displays in French when French is selected
Technical details (email, phone, company name) remain unchanged
The MORSHID logo in footer remains unchanged
Footer structure and layout remain unchanged

file_operations.description: Replace translatable text strings with translation function calls while keeping technical details (email, phone number, TMU SARL company name) and the MORSHID logo unchanged, maintaining exact footer structure

requirements.summary: Translate WhatsApp floating button tooltip/aria-label text while keeping link unchanged
acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp button tooltip/aria-label displays in French when French is selected
WhatsApp link destination (https://wa.me/212623237732) remains unchanged
Button functionality and positioning remain unchanged

file_operations.description: Replace any tooltip or aria-label text with translation function calls while keeping the WhatsApp link destination unchanged and maintaining button functionality and positioning

requirements.summary: Translate LogoPopup modal text to French while keeping 'MORSHID' unchanged
acceptanceCriteria: Popup title and message display in French when French is selected
The name 'MORSHID' in the title remains unchanged
Modal structure, close button, and functionality remain unchanged
French translation is simple and farmer-friendly

file_operations.description: Replace the title 'With MORSHID' and message text with translation function calls, keeping 'MORSHID' unchanged and maintaining modal structure, close button, and click-outside-to-close functionality
